title: [ExportVerilog] Add option to force posedge/negedge values to be in a wire
body: Some tools don't like it if the `x` in a `@(posedge x)` is not strictly a name referring to a wire. Specifically, we've seen `localparam x = ...; @(posedge x)` break. We should add an option to ExportVerilog/firtool that forces all values used in sensitivity lists of processes to be spilled into wires.
